message:
chore(gitignore): exclude runtime-generated logs directory

The logs/ directory is populated by performance benchmarking runs (Phase 5 QA)
and should not be committed to the repository. Individual log files are referenced
in docs/perf/bevy_vs_gpui.md for documentation purposes but are generated at runtime.

Runtime log files:
- logs/perf/<scenario>_<renderer>.log (benchmark output)
- Captured via SB_DIAGNOSTICS=1 environment variable
- Used for offline FPS/frame-time percentile analysis

This exclusion prevents CI artifacts and local benchmark runs from polluting the
git history with ephemeral data files.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
